\section{Summary}

% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{AI Engineer \& Software Engineer}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected LLM/RAG risk detection system processing 10K+ audit cases/month across 1M+ employee records --- aligning with audit and compliance stakeholders to flag time fraud, tax miscalculations, and duplicate payments --- reducing manual audit effort by 40\%.
  \item Engineered LangChain investigation agents to automate root-cause analysis across payroll anomalies; improved classification precision to 80\% and cut false positives by 25\%, eliminating unnecessary escalations.
  \item Integrated AWS Bedrock and OpenAI into production HR automation workflows, communicating model tradeoffs with product and support to improve operational efficiency 30\% and reduce resolution time 25\%.
  \item Built RAG pipelines ingesting IRS codes and state labor laws alongside structured payroll data; partnered with compliance to define rules, automated classification, and generated audit trails for every flagged case, eliminating manual regulatory cross-referencing.
  \item Architected Node.js/Express microservices orchestrating LLM inference pipelines, handling 10,000+ daily API calls at \textless{}200 ms latency via connection pooling and caching strategies.
  \item Deployed on AWS (Lambda, Step Functions, DynamoDB, RDS, Glue) and Pivotal Cloud Foundry; cut infrastructure costs 40\% and eliminated 15+ hours of manual testing weekly while maintaining 99.9\%+ availability.
  \item Designed responsive React and Angular/TypeScript dashboards enabling auditors to visualize risk patterns and interact with AI-generated insights in real time; incorporated feedback from audit teams and improved Time-to-Interactive by 1.2 seconds.
\end{itemize}

% ── PROJECTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Projects}

\entry{Job Tailor}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder}{github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://jobtailor.in/}{jobtailor.in}}{2025 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected and shipped AI job application SaaS end-to-end as sole engineer --- Next.js 14, TypeScript, PostgreSQL/Supabase, Vercel --- serving Indian job seekers across 5 integrated job platforms.
  \item Engineered real-time job aggregation pipeline across Naukri, Indeed India, Internshala, Adzuna, and RemoteOK; Groq AI scores each opportunity by fit with ranked breakdown, cutting 100s of listings to a personalised shortlist instantly.
  \item Shipped AI resume tailoring pipeline (PDF → ATS keyword gap analysis → LLM bullet rewrite → cover letter → cold outreach) achieving 85\%+ keyword coverage on tailored outputs --- packaged as a live production SaaS.
\end{itemize}

\entry{Keen --- AI Due Diligence Platform}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/keen}{github.com/lohith261/keen} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://keen-sigma.vercel.app/}{keen-sigma.vercel.app}}{2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected multi-agent due diligence automation platform for PE firms --- research agents integrate Salesforce, NetSuite, SEC EDGAR, HubSpot, and Crunchbase; TinyFish browser automation accesses locked platforms (Bloomberg, LinkedIn, SAP) with real-time pipeline monitoring and pause/resume without progress loss.
  \item Engineered Claude AI analysis layer that cross-references aggregated business data to surface revenue mismatches, audit red flags, and risk discrepancies; exports reports as PDF, Excel, or Google Sheets. Stack: React/TypeScript (Vercel) + Python 3.11 (Fly.io) + Supabase + Redis.
\end{itemize}
